notes: Created Cloudflare Pages deployment surface for project netraverse-com. Production domain still serves Namecheap parking before Pages deploy and DNS cutover.
Cloudflare Pages project netraverse-com is live and browser-QA passed on pages.dev. www.netraverse.com still returns Namecheap Parking/1.0 until DNS/nameserver cutover.
Cloudflare DNS is staged. Registrar still needs nameserver cutover from dns1/dns2.registrar-servers.com to Cloudflare before www.netraverse.com can serve Pages.

Cloudflare zone and Pages custom domains are active. OpenClaw Chromium production QA passed. Apex redirects to www via Cloudflare Redirect Rule. Local Mac resolver showed intermittent stale 198.18.* parking cache immediately after cutover; authoritative DNS and Cloudflare IP-directed probes pass.
